english: after / afterwards / later on / from (a time) on

english: before / previously / (after a time phrase) ago
notes: The word before í does not change tone. Before a verb it means formerly/previously. After a time phrase the í may be dropped.

khǹg/hē tòa: used of the future and in commands/requests; otherwise use khǹg/hē tī.
